parameters.content:
## NDR Monitor — Spam Folder
**Purpose:** Sister workflow to wf-ndr-monitor (INBOX). Fires on every new email in the **Spam** folder. Extracts real email addresses from every field (incl. decoded attachments) and inserts each as a row into `email_probe_bounces`.
**Why:** Some bounce NDRs land in Spam instead of INBOX. This ensures those bounces are still captured.
**Must be ALWAYS ACTIVE**
